title: Agent Clearing House + RefusalGraph Partner Summary
problem: Agent communication and payment do not determine whether a risky request should proceed.
solution: A draft pre-action clearing, refusal-intelligence, receipt, and verification layer.
unique_advantage: Before an agent says yes, it can check who already said no - and why.
future_fee_model: Clearance, receipt verification, and refusal lookup remain disabled commercial hypotheses.
safety_statement: Internal draft only. Nothing is shared, published, networked, tracked, billed, paid, settled, or executed.
